name: Dr. Elena Researcher
title: Cognitive Neuroscientist
about: Exploring the intersection of artificial neural networks and human neuroplasticity. My research focuses on developing brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) to restore motor function in stroke patients.

experience.description: Directing a $2M NSF-funded lab exploring motor cortex decoding using non-invasive EEG arrays.
Conducted clinical trials for novel BCI interfaces yielding a 35% improvement in patient recovery metrics.

projects.title: Neural Decoding of Speech
projects.description: Published in Nature Neuroscience. Developed a closed-loop BCI system that decodes imagined speech from motor cortex activity with 92% accuracy.

projects.title: Synaptic Plasticity Modeling
projects.description: Created a novel computational model of long-term depression (LTD) at the hippocampal Schaffer collateral synapse.
